action.description: Synthetic preview of the visible draft summary after an attended DevHub permit-start walkthrough.

source_backed_outcome_evidence.citation: Official DevHub permit application guide, apply for permits workflow.
source_backed_outcome_evidence.supports_outcome: DevHub permit requests can involve dynamic questions, draft review, uploaded documents, acknowledgement, and later submission steps.
source_backed_outcome_evidence.observed_preview_fact: The synthetic cycle stopped at a local preview summary before acknowledgement, upload, or submit controls.

source_backed_outcome_evidence.citation: Official online permitting tools overview, DevHub entry point and service list.
source_backed_outcome_evidence.supports_outcome: DevHub is the WetWijzer online permitting system and includes account-scoped permit services.
source_backed_outcome_evidence.observed_preview_fact: The review packet treats the browser cycle as user-attended and records only commit-safe workflow metadata.

user_visible_confirmation.text: Preview complete. No official permit record was changed. Next actions are limited to read-only review or a local preview update.

blocked_consequential_followups.requires_user_confirmation: exact action confirmation from the attended user
blocked_consequential_followups.reason: Submitting a permit request can create or alter an official City record.

blocked_consequential_followups.requires_user_confirmation: exact certification confirmation from the attended user
blocked_consequential_followups.reason: Acknowledgement and certification steps require human review and explicit consent.

blocked_consequential_followups.requires_user_confirmation: exact upload confirmation from the attended user
blocked_consequential_followups.reason: Official uploads attach documents to an account-scoped permitting workflow.

blocked_consequential_followups.requires_user_confirmation: exact purchase confirmation from the attended user
blocked_consequential_followups.reason: Purchasing a trade permit is an official financial workflow.

blocked_consequential_followups.requires_user_confirmation: exact inspection scheduling confirmation from the attended user
blocked_consequential_followups.reason: Scheduling an inspection changes an official City schedule.

blocked_consequential_followups.requires_user_confirmation: exact cancellation or withdrawal confirmation from the attended user
blocked_consequential_followups.reason: Cancellation or withdrawal can alter or terminate an official request.

blocked_consequential_followups.requires_user_confirmation: exact extension or reactivation confirmation from the attended user
blocked_consequential_followups.reason: Extension or reactivation changes official permit lifecycle state.

blocked_consequential_followups.requires_user_confirmation: the attended user must enter private financial values directly
blocked_consequential_followups.reason: Payment detail entry contains private financial data and is outside preview-only automation.

blocked_consequential_followups.requires_user_confirmation: exact fee action confirmation from the attended user
blocked_consequential_followups.reason: Final fee actions are financial workflows and are outside preview-only automation.

next_safe_actions.label: Review cited public PP&D guide sections
next_safe_actions.citation: Official DevHub guide and online permitting tools overview support read-only source review.

next_safe_actions.label: Render a local preview summary from redacted fixture facts
next_safe_actions.citation: Official DevHub guide supports draft review before acknowledgement and submission steps.
